bullets: Mexican forces, aided by CIA intelligence, killed notorious cartel leader Nemesio 'El Mencho' Oseguera, triggering widespread violence including arson, blockades, and chaos in Guadalajara, stranding U.S. tourists.
Deadly Russian attacks hit Ukraine on the eve of the fourth anniversary of the full-scale invasion, with President Zelenskyy calling it the start of World War III.
U.S. Secret Service agents fatally shot an armed man attempting to breach former President Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort in Florida.
Israeli airstrikes on Hezbollah positions in Lebanon killed at least 10 people, escalating tensions in the Middle East.
A new assessment estimates Ukraine's war damages at over $195 billion, up from $176 billion, highlighting massive reconstruction needs.
cybercab: Tesla Cybercabs were spotted testing at Gigafactory Texas, with CEO Elon Musk confirming production to begin by April and a price under $30,000 by 2027.
market_mood: U.S. stock indexes closed lower amid tariff uncertainty and AI disruptions, with the Dow dropping 800 points, though broader economic sentiment remains largely bullish with rising consumer confidence in the eurozone.
hot_spot: The killing of Mexican cartel boss El Mencho has sparked urgent chaos and violence across Mexico, including attacks on infrastructure and stranded tourists, prompting U.S. travel warnings.
